name: Postcards
description: A digital postcard gallery — browse saved postcards, create new ones, and share visual messages.
purpose: Give users a visual, tactile way to save and share moments as postcard-style images.
primaryActions: Save a postcard to your collection
welcomeScript: Welcome to Postcards. Browse the gallery or save a card to your collection. Each postcard is a moment worth keeping.
suggestedPrompts: How do I create a postcard?
